title: TravelKrazzy — AI Powered Travel Platform
description: Engineered an enterprise-grade travel ecosystem inspired by MakeMyTrip, integrating Amadeus APIs for real-time flights and hotel reservations, AVIS APIs for car rental workflows, and dynamic booking orchestration. Designed an AI-powered travel assistant using OpenAI LLM for conversational trip planning, intelligent recommendations, contextual customer support, and seamless booking experiences across multiple travel channels.

title: API Control Platform — Multi-Tenant SaaS Infrastructure
description: Architecting a next-generation multi-tenant API management platform built for SaaS businesses. Designed secure API governance, tenant-level rate limiting, encryption key management, event-driven telemetry pipelines, developer SDK generation, and real-time analytics using distributed messaging systems, caching layers, and cloud-native deployment strategies.

title: RuralGPT — WhatsApp Native Livestock Intelligence Platform
description: Designed an AI-first WhatsApp-native platform for rural farmers, enabling instant livestock health guidance through voice, text, and multilingual conversations. Built conversational workflows powered by OpenAI LLM, speech processing, contextual retrieval, and intelligent recommendations to deliver real-time farming intelligence directly through familiar messaging experiences.

title: House of Peace — Global Music Streaming Platform
description: Delivered a production-scale music streaming platform from architecture to deployment, enabling artists and listeners to connect through secure audio streaming, subscription workflows, media upload pipelines, real-time notifications, and scalable content delivery. Built backend services, cloud storage workflows, live communication systems, and administrative dashboards supporting real-world production traffic.
